color_spray.name: Color Spray
color_spray.description: Setup/Builder: A dazzling flash of color that confuses the foe. Generates 15 Concentration and 1 Illusion Pip.

mirror_image.name: Mirror Image
mirror_image.description: Setup: Create duplicates of yourself. Generates 1 Illusion Pip and grants [Evasive] for 2 ticks.

phantasmal_inferno.name: Phantasmal Inferno
phantasmal_inferno.description: Payoff: An illusion of absolute fire that deals mental damage. Consumes 5 Illusion Pips.

mind_shatter.name: Mind Shatter
mind_shatter.description: Payoff: Break the target's psyche. Consumes 3 Illusion Pips to deal high Magic damage and apply [Stunned] for 2 ticks.

prism_cloak.name: Prism Cloak
prism_cloak.description: Defense: Bend light around you to become hard to see. Grants [Concealed] and 30% Evasion.

hallucinate.name: Hallucinate
hallucinate.description: Defense/Disruption: Force the target to see multiple versions of you. Reduces their hit chance by 50% for 4 ticks.

phase_shift.name: Phase Shift
phase_shift.description: Mobility: Teleport to a location within the same room instantly.

invisibility.name: Invisibility
invisibility.description: Utility/Signature: Become completely invisible to all enemies for 15 ticks. Breaking invisibility with an attack deals double damage.

illusionist_physiology.name: Illusionist Physiology
illusionist_physiology.description: Passive: Reality Warp. You gain 10% Evasion and 15% increased duration for all Illusion manifestations.
